servicesPage.intro: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co provides a full range of plumbing and heating services in Dallas, TX. From emergency repairs to new installations, our experienced technicians deliver quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. Explore our services below.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency plumbing repairs in Dallas. Fast response, any time.
services.longDescription: When a plumbing emergency strikes, you need a plumber who answers the call. Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co offers round-the-clock emergency services for burst pipes, severe clogs, overflowing toilets, and more. Our technicians are equipped with the latest tools to diagnose and fix the problem quickly, minimizing damage to your property. We serve all of Dallas with prompt, professional care.
benefits: Upfront pricing with no overtime charges

process.title: Step 1: Call or Book Online
process.description: Contact us anytime. We'll ask a few questions to prepare for your visit.

process.title: Step 2: Rapid Dispatch
process.description: A technician is sent to your location immediately, equipped to handle the issue.

process.title: Step 3: Fast Repair & Cleanup
process.description: We fix the problem, test the system, and leave your property clean and safe.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency calls?
faqs.answer: No. We offer standard rates 24/7 with no hidden fees. You'll get an upfront estimate before work begins.

faqs.question: How fast can you get to my home?
faqs.answer: We guarantee arrival within 60 minutes of your call. Most emergencies are handled even faster.

services.title: Water Heater Services
services.shortDescription: Installation, repair, and maintenance of all water heater types.
services.longDescription: Whether you need a new water heater installed or your existing one repaired, Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co has you covered. We work with all major brands and types, including tankless, gas, electric, and hybrid models. Our team will help you choose the most energy-efficient option for your home and budget. We also offer routine maintenance to extend the life of your unit and prevent breakdowns.
benefits: Free consultation on water heater replacement

process.title: Step 1: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current system, hot water needs, and budget to recommend the best solution.

process.title: Step 2: Installation or Repair
process.description: Our technicians perform the work efficiently, following all safety codes.

process.title: Step 3: Testing & Walkthrough
process.description: We test the system, show you how to operate it, and answer any questions.

faqs.question: How long does a water heater installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in one day. Tankless units may require additional time for gas line or venting modifications.

faqs.question: What size water heater do I need?
faqs.answer: It depends on your household size and usage. We provide a free assessment to determine the right capacity.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Professional drain cleaning to clear clogs and prevent backups.
services.longDescription: Slow drains and recurring clogs are more than an inconvenience — they can lead to serious plumbing issues. Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co uses advanced hydro-jetting and auger tools to clear blockages safely and thoroughly. We clean drains for sinks, showers, tubs, and main sewer lines. Regular drain maintenance helps prevent emergencies and keeps your plumbing flowing smoothly.

process.title: Step 1: Camera Inspection
process.description: We use a sewer camera to locate the clog and assess pipe condition.

process.title: Step 2: Choose Method
process.description: Based on the clog, we select hydro-jetting or mechanical snaking for effective removal.

process.title: Step 3: Clear & Verify
process.description: After cleaning, we run water and perform a final camera check to ensure the line is clear.

faqs.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend professional cleaning every 1-2 years for preventive maintenance, or as needed for recurring clogs.

faqs.question: Is hydro-jetting safe for old pipes?
faqs.answer: Yes, hydro-jetting uses high-pressure water that is safe for all pipe materials when performed by a trained technician.

services.title: Heating & Furnace Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert heating repair and installation for Dallas winters.
services.longDescription: When the temperature drops, you need a reliable heating system. Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co provides comprehensive heating services, including furnace repair, installation, and maintenance. We work with gas, electric, and heat pump systems. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and fix issues quickly, ensuring your home stays warm and comfortable all winter long.

process.title: Step 1: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect your system to identify the problem, checking all components.

process.title: Step 2: Repair or Replacement
process.description: We provide a clear estimate and proceed with the necessary repairs or installation.

process.title: Step 3: System Test
process.description: We run the system through a full cycle to ensure it's operating safely and efficiently.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need a new furnace?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent repairs, uneven heating, rising energy bills, or a unit over 15 years old. We can help you decide.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance plans?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer seasonal maintenance plans to keep your heating system running efficiently and catch issues early.

about.headline: Your Trusted Local Plumber in Dallas Since 1985
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners and businesses with reliable, honest, and affordable plumbing and heating services, delivered with integrity and exceptional craftsmanship.
story: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co was founded in 1985 with a simple mission: deliver quality plumbing services with old-fashioned customer service. What started as a one-man operation has grown into a trusted team of licensed professionals serving the entire Dallas area. We've built our reputation on reliability, transparency, and a commitment to doing the job right the first time.

Over the decades, we've helped thousands of Dallas residents with everything from minor faucet repairs to major water heater installations and emergency pipe replacements. We're proud to be a family-owned business that treats every customer like a neighbor. Our team stays up-to-date with the latest technology and techniques to provide efficient, lasting solutions.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always do what's right for our customers, even if it means recommending a less expensive solution.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Our work meets the highest standards. We use top-grade materials and proven techniques.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and stand behind every job.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we're invested in the neighborhoods we serve. We support local causes and hire locally.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call us or fill out the form below.
